description: Per-case inspection location for the EVA record. References a Repairer (repairerId, most common) OR holds an ad-hoc location (storage yard, claimant home) OR the 'Image Based Assessment' marker. Carries the decision mode -- image_based ALWAYS requires an explicit reviewer decision + reason (never a silent pass).

lifecycle.note: Defined and staged; M1 = policy gate + manual 6-line entry. Candidate ranking (M2) / EXIF+Azure Maps (M3) deferred.

primaryColumn.description: Short label for the location (e.g. 'Image Based Assessment', repairer name, or 'Claimant home').

columns.description: -> Repairer (when the location IS a known repairer; don't duplicate the address). Nullable for ad-hoc / image-based.
confirmed_physical | manual | image_based | unknown. image_based requires a non-empty decisionReason.
REQUIRED when decisionMode=image_based (override-with-reason). Recorded per the M1 policy gate; validated client + flow side.

Discriminator for the catalogue row's origin. Confirmed reference rows: repairer | storage | home (the kind of ad-hoc source), all decisionMode=confirmed_physical. Low-confidence externally-sourced rows: 'suggested' (optionally 'suggested:<address_status>', e.g. 'suggested:candidate_multiple_addresses'), ALWAYS decisionMode=unknown -- never auto-confirmed. The Code App reads suggestions via startswith(cr1bd_sourcelabel,'suggested'); 16-seed-suggested-addresses.ps1 is the loader.
Source / evidence note backing the address decision.
Ad-hoc 6-line address, line 1 (used when not referencing a Repairer).
UK postcode (normalised via postcode.io; AZURE_MAPS_ENABLED=false selects postcode.io in M1).

alternateKeys.description: Natural key on the deterministic label, enabling atomic PATCH-to-key upsert (Dataverse rejects upsert with 400 when no alternate key exists). Used by 16-seed-suggested-addresses.ps1 to re-run safely against the continuously-changing external suggestions source. The 12-seed confirmed-site loader keys on the same column via get-or-create, so labels remain unique across confirmed + suggested rows.

notes: The serialized EVA inspection address (6 lines, padded, or 'Image Based Assessment') is written to Case.cr1bd_evainspectionaddress (EVA field 9).
No path may yield 'Image Based Assessment' without decisionMode=image_based + a non-empty decisionReason.

Suggested rows (sourceLabel startswith 'suggested') are catalogue-only: decisionMode=unknown, NEVER mirrored onto a Case, surfaced in the Code App strictly as low-confidence suggestions a reviewer must confirm. Loaded by 16-seed-suggested-addresses.ps1; asserted by 17-verify-suggested-addresses.ps1.
